name: Walsin Technology Corporation
summary: Walsin Technology Corporation manufactures and sells passive components worldwide. The company provides multiple-layer ceramic chip capacitors/arrays, chip-resistors/arrays and networks, RF filters, inductors, disc capacitors, varistors, antennas, chip fuses, thin film products, safety components, modules, etc. Its products are used in mobile device, networking, automotive, industrial, power supply, IoT, green energy, PC and peripherals, and lighting. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
